raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the section stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of the adaptive MPC framework.","R1.2":"Strengthening the passage requires checking that the causal chain from prediction residuals to updates to tracking performance is coherent.","R1.3":"The passage makes empirical claims about tracking error, robustness, and real-time overhead that must remain aligned with the reported evaluation.","R1.5":"The section-level narrative can be strengthened by improving the ordering from method to trigger design to evaluation to limitation.","R1.6":"The most direct responsibility is sentence- and paragraph-level improvement because the artifact has tense shifts, run-ons, and imprecise phrasing.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the passage contains assumptions, apparent robustness, and unproven stability.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is active because claims about robustness, advantage over alternatives, and deployment feasibility could be overstated.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active because the delegation is broad but should remain limited to strengthening this research-writing artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because overstated control-system claims could mislead readers about safety or deployability.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because any strengthening should preserve which claims come from reported experiments, prior experience, or assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the section stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of the adaptive MPC framework.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the passage requires checking that the causal chain from prediction residuals to updates to tracking performance is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes empirical claims about tracking error, robustness, and real-time overhead that must remain aligned with the reported evaluation.
rationale.R1.5: The section-level narrative can be strengthened by improving the ordering from method to trigger design to evaluation to limitation.
rationale.R1.6: The most direct responsibility is sentence- and paragraph-level improvement because the artifact has tense shifts, run-ons, and imprecise phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the passage contains assumptions, apparent robustness, and unproven stability.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is active because claims about robustness, advantage over alternatives, and deployment feasibility could be overstated.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active because the delegation is broad but should remain limited to strengthening this research-writing artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because overstated control-system claims could mislead readers about safety or deployability.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because any strengthening should preserve which claims come from reported experiments, prior experience, or assumptions.
